goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 15:45' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time', 'travel time', and 'price'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should have 'a star of 3'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 15:45 and should leave on monday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to bishops stortford
Make sure you get arrival time, travel time, and price
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should have a star of 3
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should include free parking
Make sure you get phone number
